comment: TLS-Anvil skip list for ztls. Patterns are matched against the test display name, stable test id, and DISABLED reason using case-sensitive shell-style globbing (Python fnmatch). Each skip must cite a GitHub issue or an explicit out-of-scope/tool-state decision.

skip.pattern: *Target does not send a Hello Retry Request*
skip.reason: HelloRetryRequest is deferred (#1)
PSK/resumption is deferred (#2)

skip.pattern: *Server does not issue Session Tickets and might ignore the extension*
skip.reason: PSK/session-ticket resumption is deferred (#2)
0-RTT is deferred (#3)
Client certificate auth is deferred (#4)
record_size_limit is outside the current supported surface (#34)
0-RTT/early data is deferred (#3)
max_fragment_length is outside the current supported surface (#34)
DTLS is out of scope
TLS 1.2 is out of scope
TLS 1.2 is out of scope

skip.pattern: *TLS 1.2 is not supported by the server.*
skip.reason: TLS 1.2 is out of scope
TLS 1.0/1.1/1.2 compatibility behavior is out of scope
FFDHE named groups are outside the current named-group scope (#6)
FFDHE named groups are outside the current named-group scope (#6)

skip.pattern: *Specific features required for the test have not been met by the SUT for derivation parameter NAMED_GROUP*
skip.reason: non-X25519 named-group support is tracked separately (#6)

skip.pattern: *Sender restrictions are not expected to be enforced*
skip.reason: TLS-Anvil disabled sender-restriction test; no execution evidence
TLS compression is outside the TLS 1.3-only runner scope (#9)
NewSessionTicket issuance/resumption is deferred (#2)
TLS-Anvil disables this client-side PSK test; PSK/resumption is deferred (#2)

skip.pattern: *The DisablePsk config option is not tested.*
skip.reason: TLS-Anvil configuration-option self-test is not ztls conformance evidence

skip.pattern: *ProtocolVersion of the test is not supported by the target*
skip.reason: TLS 1.2/DTLS/legacy-version tests are out of scope for the TLS 1.3-only runner (#9)

skip.pattern: *Target does not provide Ciphersuites that are supported by the test.*
skip.reason: legacy compression/cipher-suite compatibility behavior is out of scope for the TLS 1.3-only runner (#9)
